title: chrysanthemum komarovii
intro: Chrysanthemum komarovii, also known as the Komarov's chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum komarovii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
